additionalValidatedControls: Backup Now creates a backup artifact and updates backup status
Install App button truthfully disables when no install prompt is available
Check App Update returns explicit status feedback
Webhook test/flush now report configuration gaps instead of false success
Wearable Import Sample adds explicit demo data only
Peer Sync code creation and apply flow succeed locally

tickets.title: Exercise browser blocked by CSP
tickets.resolution: Removed the blocked remote hydration path and kept the browser local-first.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls confirms the modal opens locally with no wger.de requests.

tickets.title: Dashboard shortcut buttons do not navigate
tickets.resolution: Direct shell bindings now route users into the correct tab/subtab targets.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls covers header, dashboard, FAB, and protocol routing.

tickets.title: Settings reset does not reset unsaved changes
tickets.resolution: Workout settings reset now reverts to persisted values without saving defaults.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls mutates a field and confirms reset restores the saved value.

tickets.title: Header avatar affordance is inert
tickets.resolution: The header avatar is now a real button bound to Profile settings.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls opens settings from the header avatar.

tickets.title: Export utilities are not producing verifiable downloads
tickets.resolution: Exports now emit explicit artifact-prepared metadata and deterministic success/failure feedback.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls and browser truth utility controls verify JSON, CSV, and backup artifacts.

tickets.title: Recent food row delete affordance does not produce a clear result
tickets.resolution: Destructive row actions now confirm clearly and provide item-specific undo feedback.
tickets.verification: Regression suite remained green after the destructive-action flow hardening.

tickets.title: Report export is not verifiably completing
tickets.resolution: Stats exports now create explicit report-summary and image artifacts instead of ambiguous print behavior.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls verifies report summary and image export artifacts.

tickets.title: Startup interaction readiness feels fragile
tickets.resolution: The shell now blocks interaction until bindings are ready and direct actions are attached.
tickets.verification: Critical-control routing stays stable across the focused browser-truth lane and full UAT.

tickets.title: Coming-soon layout switch banner should be removed
tickets.resolution: The fake coming-soon banner is removed when the locked layout is active.
tickets.verification: Browser truth critical controls confirms the settings surface no longer shows the removed coming-soon language.

tickets.title: Duplicate empty-state CTA surfaces create clutter
tickets.resolution: Secondary empty-state CTA clutter was demoted to guidance text on the workout logging surfaces.
tickets.verification: Full UAT remained green after the CTA cleanup and browser-truth critical flow checks.
